data.body: AC amendment (gap-4): Lazy-source + set -euo pipefail safety. Add ACs: (a) dispatcher remains strict-mode after sourcing library (set -o | grep nounset and errexit both 'on' after source); (b) DSO_TICKET_LEGACY=1 fallback produces byte-identical stdout vs source-path for same ticket show call; (c) ticket_show body must be strict-mode-safe (no unquoted unset var refs — inherits caller set -u inside subshell).
